title: Highlights from the most recent batch of UFO files
description: The Pentagon released a third batch of UFO files on Friday as the Trump administration continues its wave of disclosures.

title: UFO leakers expose disturbing government tactics used to keep America's alien cover-up a secret
description: A trio of whistleblowers and witnesses have come forward claiming they paid a steep personal price after speaking out about UFOs they encountered.

title: What happened to William McCasland? Final photo of missing ex-Air Force general sparks UFO questions
description: Retired Air Force Major General William Neil McCasland, missing in New Mexico, was last seen at a sporting goods store.

title: New UFO files describe spinning discs, glowing orbs and one object shaped like a potato
description: New UFO files have been released by the Trump administration that include several vivid descriptions of mysterious sightings in the sky.
